'''Tac-Spec Corporation''' was not actually a real company, but was a front for the [[GenoHaradan]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] guild. Their only major product was the the [[FIII Footman droid]]s. Tac-Spec Corporation remained in business for approximately six hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] (approximately [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] to [[400 BBY/Legends|400 BBY]]).

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}}
